businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue hit $4.48B (+56%), with US commercial revenue surpassing $500M. After market close on 3/20, Reuters exclusively reported: Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official 'program of record', locking in long-term budget allocation and institutional permanence for Palantir's weapons-targeting AI across the US military.

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 10x S&P 500 avg (22x). Still extreme but Maven adoption strengthens growth visibility

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.34. High but Maven adoption materially improves revenue visibility

keyMetrics.name: P/S Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Investors pay $77 per $1 of revenue. Extreme vs SaaS avg 10-15x but Rule of 40 at 127%

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier among SaaS. High profitability with high growth simultaneously

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: FCF $2.1B. Best-in-class cash generation in software

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI adopted as Pentagon 'program of record' (3/20 after hours)
growthDrivers.description: Reuters exclusive: Deputy SecDef Steve Feinberg sent a letter confirming Maven as an official program of record. This locks in long-term budget allocation and institutionalizes Palantir's weapons-targeting AI across all US military branches. A game changer amid Iran war preparations.

growthDrivers.title: Moder AI mortgage partnership: Financial services expansion
growthDrivers.description: Co-developing AI mortgage operations platform with Freedom Mortgage as first pilot. Proves commercial expansion beyond defense.

growthDrivers.title: UBS $200 raise + Wedbush $230 + Mizuho $195 reaffirmed
growthDrivers.description: Three firms simultaneously bullish. UBS raised from $180 to $200 (+33%). Mizuho: 'No comparable company in software.'

growthDrivers.title: US Navy ShipOS $448M: AI applied to submarine production
growthDrivers.description: Keel joined Palantir's ShipOS project for the US Navy. AI now applied to submarine production lines.

growthDrivers.title: Iran war preparations directly stimulate defense AI demand
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon preparing ground forces for Iran deployment. Maven is the core combat AI system. War escalation could drive Palantir revenue surge.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years in government/defense AI. Security clearances create insurmountable barriers. Maven program of record status cements US military AI standard.

moats.description: Pentagon adopted Maven as official program of record. Long-term budget allocation confirmed. Institutional lock-in.
Highest DoD and intelligence agency security clearances. Competitors cannot enter.
Sovereign AI OS + NVIDIA hardware ecosystem. Positioning as default government AI infrastructure.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Expanding into analytics platform territory

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI. Trails Palantir in scale and track record

recentNews.headline: Reuters exclusive: Pentagon adopts Maven AI as official 'program of record'
recentNews.significance: Deputy SecDef Feinberg sent letter to Pentagon leaders. Palantir's weapons-targeting AI becomes permanent military system. Long-term budget confirmed. Defense AI game changer.

recentNews.headline: CBS: Pentagon preparing Iran ground forces, S&P 500 breaks 200-day MA
recentNews.significance: Iran war escalation risk at peak. Paradoxically stimulates defense AI demand. Maven's battlefield necessity maximized.

recentNews.headline: Mizuho reaffirms Outperform $195: 'No comparable company in software'
Guardian: Palantir Swiss magazine lawsuit, 'intimidation campaign'
recentNews.significance: European privacy controversy continues. NHS adviser resignation. European public contract risk.

recentNews.headline: Moder AI mortgage platform partnership announced
recentNews.significance: Freedom Mortgage pilot. Proving AI expansion from defense to finance.

analystOpinions.notableComment: UBS $200 (+33%), Wedbush $230 (+53%), Mizuho $195 reaffirmed. 16 of 28 Buy. Maven program of record news broke after hours, not yet reflected in price. Monday reaction expected.

risks.title: Extreme valuation: P/E 221x, P/S 77x
risks.description: 10x S&P avg. Even with Maven adoption, current valuation already prices in substantial growth.

risks.title: Swiss lawsuit + NHS adviser exit: European risk
risks.description: Guardian reported 'intimidation campaign.' European public contract risk persists.

risks.title: Insider selling continues
risks.description: CEO Karp $6.6M, Cohen $43.7M. Management actively taking profits at current levels.

risks.title: Iran war dual-edged sword
risks.description: War stimulates defense AI demand but market-wide panic can drag high-valuation stocks down regardless.

risks.title: Stock dilution
risks.description: Annual ~5% dilution from SBC. Structural drag on long-term returns.

buyReasons.title: Maven program of record: US military AI standard locked in
buyReasons.rationale: Pentagon program of record = confirmed long-term budget. Extremely difficult for competitors to displace. After-hours news should drive Monday gap-up.

buyReasons.title: Iran war preparations directly stimulate defense AI demand
buyReasons.rationale: Pentagon preparing Iran ground deployment. Maven is the essential combat AI system. War escalation = revenue acceleration.

buyReasons.title: Triple bullish: UBS $200, Wedbush $230, Mizuho $195
buyReasons.rationale: 30%+ upside expanded by price decline. Additional upgrades likely post-Maven news.

buyReasons.title: $11.2B backlog + Rule of 40 at 127%
buyReasons.rationale: Maximum revenue visibility. Simultaneously achieving 60% growth and 31% operating margin is extremely rare.

overallOpinion: Reuters dropped a decisive bombshell after the close: Pentagon adopted Palantir's Maven AI as an official 'program of record.' Long-term budget is confirmed, making Palantir the US military's AI standard.

The timing is striking. As Pentagon prepares for Iran ground deployment, Maven's battlefield necessity has never been greater. The stock closed at $150.68 (-3.21%) but this news will be priced in Monday.
Below the 50-day ($152) and 200-day ($163) MAs, but Maven adoption + Iran defense demand + three analyst upgrades point to a Monday gap-up. Strong Buy.

investmentVerdict.summary: Maven becoming a Pentagon 'program of record' is a game changer. It means confirmed long-term budgets and institutional lock-in that competitors can barely challenge. With Iran war preparations driving defense AI demand to a peak, Palantir is the direct beneficiary. P/E 221x is a concern but Rule of 40 at 127%, 60% revenue growth, and Maven adoption together create a compelling case. Monday gap-up expected. Strong Buy.

threads.hook: Maven is Pentagon's official AI system now. Palantir's game just changed
threads.text:
$PLTR $150.68(-3.21%)

Friday after the close, Reuters broke the news: Pentagon adopted Maven AI as a 'program of record.' Long-term budget confirmed. Palantir is now the official US military AI standard.

Timing is everything. Pentagon is preparing Iran ground forces at the same time Maven becomes permanent. P/E 221x is a concern but Rule of 40 at 127%, 60% growth, and institutional defense lock-in.

UBS $200, Wedbush $230, Mizuho $195. Monday gap-up expected. Strong Buy. Target $196(+30%).
